lines.descriptionTooltipText: Line-level production notes. When transferred to ERP, Netsis mapping is: Description 1 -> Extra Field 1, Description 2 -> Extra Field 2, Description 3 -> Line Extra Description 7.
lines.profileErpTooltip: This Profile selection is saved to the Netsis Line Extra Description 2 field when sent to ERP.
lines.rebarErpTooltip: This Rebar selection is sent to ERP as the Netsis Line Extra Description 3 value.
lines.screwErpTooltip: This Screw selection is sent to ERP as the Netsis Line Extra Description 4 value.
lines.printErpTooltip: This Print selection is sent to ERP as the Netsis Line Extra Description 8 value. The print note is also sent to Netsis line Description 9 and Line Extra Description 9.

notes.title: Order Notes
notes.description: Add and update internal notes for this order.
notes.notesTooltipText: Shipment/invoice notes for the whole order. They are saved sequentially to Netsis order header Extra Description 1-5; note 2 is sent to Netsis Extra Description 2.
notes.linesHint: Each line appears separately in PDF and document notes.
notes.maxLengthError: Note field can be at most 100 characters.

erpOrder.title: ERP Order List
erpOrder.description: Review Netsis order headers and lines visible for the logged-in user.
erpOrder.searchPlaceholder: Search order no, customer, sales rep or date...
erpOrder.loadError: ERP orders could not be loaded.
erpOrder.lineLoadError: Order lines could not be loaded.
erpOrder.noLines: No lines found for this order.

header.descriptionErpTooltip: General production note for the whole order. When sent to ERP, it is saved to the Netsis order header Description field (FatUst.Aciklama).
